proposal_summary: Fund the Calabara team with 50 ETH to build uplink.wtf, a marketing and proliferation platform for Nouns featuring Creator Contests and a new Nouns Raffle application.

disclosed_entities.name: NounsDAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: With a proven track record of funding high-quality content initiatives such as the Ordinary Folk video, Nounish productions, and more, NounsDAO boasts a diverse portfolio of content ready for widespread distribution.

disclosed_entities.name: SharkDAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: SharkDAO - source and vote on community art pieces to mint as open-editions from the DAO.

disclosed_entities.name: GnarsDAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Gnars - "Skate Your City Series". Worldwide digital skate competitions hosted by Gnars, run on Creator Contests, judged by GnarsDAO.

disclosed_entities.name: TNS
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We launched creator contests in September, and have since helped groups like TNS, Composables, SharkDAO, and others

disclosed_entities.name: Composables
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Composables - recently hosted a contest in which they observed 30+ new collections

disclosed_entities.name: NSFW
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: SharkDAO and NSFW both awarded us small grants to build the underlying infrastructure.

claimed_actions.raw_action: 30 ETH to team wallet upon execution
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Transfer 30 ETH to the team wallet
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 30 ETH to team wallet upon execution

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal primarily requests funding via a transfer and stream. The underlying software development is complex (real-time concurrency, zk-snark research), but the on-chain action requested is straightforward.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence:
We're requesting 50 ETH to fund a 3 month development cycle to deploy Creator Contests v2 and a brand new Nouns Raffle application to the new uplink.wtf platform.
... 
50 ETH for development
* 30 ETH to team wallet upon execution
* 20 ETH streamed over 3 months

limitations: Could not extract actual wallet addresses for multisig signers, as only ENS names were provided.
